commands.review_summary:
The PR expands WhatsApp QA-lab scenarios, adds evidence posture metadata and docs, and updates WhatsApp runtime support for group participant observation, busy status, and same-chat message actions.

PR surface: Source +1096, Tests +1494, Docs +34. Total +2624 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: no. live WhatsApp/Baileys reproduction was run during review; source inspection shows current main lacks same-chat WhatsApp message-action target inference and QA-driver group participant identity.
